chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.S-513 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 3 a/w reply as at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 30.06.2025 Mr. Saood Hussain, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Mr. Shariq Mubashir, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh DSP Raza Mian, DSP Legal-II. SIP Javed Khan, P.S Malir, Karachi SIP Amjad Ali, P.S Pak Bazar. SIP Shakeel Ahmed, P.S Surjani Town. SIP Manzoor Ahmed Rind, P.S Madina Colony. ASI Kamran Haider, Focal Person CTD Police Station Civil Lines. SIP Noor Ahmed, P.S Manghopir..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Through instant petition the petitioner has claimed the following relief:- A. To issue notices to the Respondent No.2 and his staff restraining them from taking law in their hands, from misusing their vested powers as well as from involving the petitioner and his family in any criminal case without due course of law in illegal manner. B. To restrain the Respondent No: 2 or any other SHO of District West Karachi (Respondent No: 6, 7, 8, 9 and 10) from calling the petitioner on account of I.R at Police Station in any manner, not to transgress from their vested powers against the petitioner and his family members in any manner. On notices, the Respondents No.2, 4, 5 and 6 to 10 have filed their replies wherein it has been mentioned that the name of the petitioner reflects in IR after due investigation that he is involved in selling narcotics under B category. It is surprising that IR report was a confidential document but found mentioned in the petition filed by the petitioner himself.

On notices, the Respondents No.2, 4, 5 and 6 to 10 have filed their replies wherein it has been mentioned that the name of the petitioner reflects in IR after due investigation that he is involved in selling narcotics under B category. It is surprising that IR report was a confidential document but found mentioned in the petition filed by the petitioner himself. It prima facie established that the police officials are in league with the petitioner for seeking protection from this Court. No case for the harassment is made out because it is the duty of the police to prevent crime and particularly crimes relating to the narcotics. It appears that the police officials have informed the petitioner regarding inclusion of his name in the IR List in B category. They are 2 warned to remain careful and if such petition by any of the suspect is filed again, appropriate action shall be taken against the concerned police official. Police officials are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if it is found that the petitioner is involved in drug trafficking, they may take appropriate action against him. The petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
